news.title:
Siemens and Rittal announce a strategic partnership to create sustainable solutions for efficient power distribution in data centers.
The collaboration targets AI data centers, aiming for standardized infrastructure and innovative power supply solutions; initial projects are underway.
news.summary:
Siemens and Rittal announce a strategic partnership to create sustainable solutions for efficient power distribution in data centers.
The collaboration targets AI data centers, aiming for standardized infrastructure and innovative power supply solutions; initial projects are underway.

news.title:
Siemens India targets AI-driven growth, leveraging govt initiatives in semiconductor, data centres, and AI.
With private sector capex reviving, Siemens expands in digital industry, smart infrastructure, and mobility segments.
news.summary:
Siemens India targets AI-driven growth, leveraging govt initiatives in semiconductor, data centres, and AI.
With private sector capex reviving, Siemens expands in digital industry, smart infrastructure, and mobility segments.

news.title:
Siemens MD Sunil Mathur confident Indian corporates will maintain capex plans despite West Asia conflict.
Fuel price-led inflation may impact earnings, but domestic market focus drives capex continuity.
news.summary:
Siemens MD Sunil Mathur confident Indian corporates will maintain capex plans despite West Asia conflict.
Fuel price-led inflation may impact earnings, but domestic market focus drives capex continuity.

news.title:
Siemens Energy sees strong demand in transmission, powergen; 3Q FY26 shows resilient profitability.
Execution softened but renewables, defense, rail infra offer structural support for medium-term outlook.
news.summary:
Siemens Energy sees strong demand in transmission, powergen; 3Q FY26 shows resilient profitability.
Execution softened but renewables, defense, rail infra offer structural support for medium-term outlook.

news.title:
Siemens Ltd.'s share price fell 5.4% on 04 Mar, closing at ₹3160.
The decline is due to disappointing quarterly earnings and sectoral weakness.
news.summary:
Siemens Ltd.'s share price fell 5.4% on 04 Mar, closing at ₹3160.
The decline is due to disappointing quarterly earnings and sectoral weakness.

news.title:
Siemens Energy partners with 6K Inc on nickel upcycling, boosting growth potential.
The deal highlights Siemens Energy's commitment to innovation and sustainable practices.
news.summary:
Siemens Energy partners with 6K Inc on nickel upcycling, boosting growth potential.
The deal highlights Siemens Energy's commitment to innovation and sustainable practices.

news.title:
Siemens Energy's revenue grew 26% YoY; operating profit rose 37%.
Adjusted net profit surged 52% YoY, beating consensus estimates.
news.summary:
Siemens Energy's revenue grew 26% YoY; operating profit rose 37%.
Adjusted net profit surged 52% YoY, beating consensus estimates.

news.title:
Siemens sees India as a key AI-led industrial hub, recording 15% revenue growth driven by infrastructure upgrades, rail modernisation, and data centre demand.
The firm focuses on localisation, AI-driven automation, and digital twin tech while pursuing bolt-on acquisitions to boost India's manufacturing and digital capacities.
news.summary:
Siemens sees India as a key AI-led industrial hub, recording 15% revenue growth driven by infrastructure upgrades, rail modernisation, and data centre demand.
The firm focuses on localisation, AI-driven automation, and digital twin tech while pursuing bolt-on acquisitions to boost India's manufacturing and digital capacities.

news.title:
Siemens Energy India to invest ₹2,060 Cr in a new power transformer factory.
This move highlights its commitment to India's energy infrastructure development.
news.summary:
Siemens Energy India to invest ₹2,060 Cr in a new power transformer factory.
This move highlights its commitment to India's energy infrastructure development.

news.title:
Siemens Energy India Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹4.61B from ₹3.35B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improves to 24.1% from 22.1% YoY.
news.summary:
Siemens Energy India Q3 EBITDA rises to ₹4.61B from ₹3.35B YoY.
Q3 EBITDA margin improves to 24.1% from 22.1% YoY.

news.title:
Siemens AG raised its yearly outlook after a strong Q1 driven by AI-related spending.
The CEO emphasized the company's strategic shift towards artificial intelligence.
news.summary:
Siemens AG raised its yearly outlook after a strong Q1 driven by AI-related spending.
The CEO emphasized the company's strategic shift towards artificial intelligence.

news.title:
Siemens AG will release Q1 FY26 results on February 12, 2026, at 07:00 CET.
A press conference call at 07:30 CET and analyst call at 08:30 CET will follow.
news.summary:
Siemens AG will release Q1 FY26 results on February 12, 2026, at 07:00 CET.
A press conference call at 07:30 CET and analyst call at 08:30 CET will follow.

news.title:
Siemens CEO Roland Busch reports over 33% rise in Q1 sales from data centre-related products.
Demand for Siemens' data centre products has surpassed expectations, indicating strong market growth.
news.summary:
Siemens CEO Roland Busch reports over 33% rise in Q1 sales from data centre-related products.
Demand for Siemens' data centre products has surpassed expectations, indicating strong market growth.

news.title: Siemens reaffirms its full-year comparative revenue growth outlook at 6-8%.
news.summary: Siemens reaffirms its full-year comparative revenue growth outlook at 6-8%.

news.title: Siemens reports Q1 revenue of 19.14 bln EUR, surpassing the 19.09 bln EUR consensus.
news.summary: Siemens reports Q1 revenue of 19.14 bln EUR, surpassing the 19.09 bln EUR consensus.

news.title:
Siemens Energy India Ltd's board to meet on Feb 13, 2026, to review Q1 FY26 unaudited financial results.
The meeting is in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations, as informed by the company secretary.
news.summary:
Siemens Energy India Ltd's board to meet on Feb 13, 2026, to review Q1 FY26 unaudited financial results.
The meeting is in compliance with SEBI Listing Regulations, as informed by the company secretary.

news.title:
Siemens Q3 FY26 net profit plunges 54.8% to ₹277 crore.
Profit decline due to higher expenses and new labour code costs.
news.summary:
Siemens Q3 FY26 net profit plunges 54.8% to ₹277 crore.
Profit decline due to higher expenses and new labour code costs.

news.title:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.
news.summary:
Tata Steel, Siemens, Bosch, Shree Cements, MRF, and others to report Q3 FY26 results on Feb 6.
Updates include Jubilant Pharmova, JK Tyre, Whirlpool, G R Infraprojects, Sun TV Network, and more.

news.title:
Siemens AG launched an AI-powered energy management platform to optimize operations, reduce expenses, and enhance grid reliability.
The platform aligns with Siemens' digitalization push, enhancing high-margin digital business momentum but raises valuation and execution risk concerns.
news.summary:
Siemens AG launched an AI-powered energy management platform to optimize operations, reduce expenses, and enhance grid reliability.
The platform aligns with Siemens' digitalization push, enhancing high-margin digital business momentum but raises valuation and execution risk concerns.

news.title:
Siemens Energy India Ltd announces its 2nd AGM on Feb 13, 2026, at 3 PM IST via video conferencing.
FY25 financials: Revenue ₹77,825M, PAT ₹11,001M, dividend ₹4/share; major contracts secured, capacity expansion initiated.
news.summary:
Siemens Energy India Ltd announces its 2nd AGM on Feb 13, 2026, at 3 PM IST via video conferencing.
FY25 financials: Revenue ₹77,825M, PAT ₹11,001M, dividend ₹4/share; major contracts secured, capacity expansion initiated.
